arts.sum: Cagliari moved eight points clear of the relegation zone thanks to a 2-0 win against Verona on Monday. The Sardi will now host Udinese, who ended a run of five straight defeats with a goalless draw a...

arts.ttl: Preview: Cagliari vs. Udinese - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Serie A clash between Cagliari and Udinese, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
